Purchase options and add-ons

Sign in to continue
  • [Flexible Configuration] This IO expansion module features an I2C interface that extends 16 IO channels, allows flexible configuration of inputs and outputs, and is compatible with both 5V and 3.3V systems.
  • [Full Features] Equipped with MicroChip's MCP23017 chip, this module offers complete functions where each of the 10 channels can be configured as input or output. In addition, features such as pull-up resistance settings and activation of the interrupt function are available for configured inputs.
  • [High Speed IC Interface] The MCP23017 chip used in this module supports a high-speed IC interface with IIC frequencies of 100 kHz, 400 kHz and 1.7 MHz, ensuring efficient and fast data transmission.
  • [Maximum I/O Expansion] With 3 address pins and 8 available addresses for configuration, this module enables up to 128 I/O expansions by connecting 8 modules via two IC buses. It offers comprehensive scalability for various applications.
  • Compact and versatile: With a size of approx. 66 x 18 mm, this IO expansion module is compact yet powerful, making it suitable for various electronic components and applications where precise IO control is required.

Product Description

16-channel IO expansion module I2C interface, MCP23017 chip, full functions, flexible configuration, high-speed IC interface with support for 100 kHz

[Flexible Configuration] This IO expansion module features an I2C interface that extends 16 IO channels, allows flexible configuration of inputs and outputs, and is compatible with both 5V and 3.3V systems.

[Maximum I/O Expansion] With 3 address pins and 8 available addresses for configuration, this module enables up to 128 I/O expansions by connecting 8 modules via two IC buses. It offers comprehensive scalability for various applications.

Compact and versatile: With a size of approx. 66 x 18 mm, this IO expansion module is compact yet powerful, making it suitable for various electronic components and applications where precise IO control is required.

Specification:

Item Type: IO Expansion Module

Working voltage: 3 V ~ 5.5 V

Frequency: Supports 100 kHz, 400 kHz, 1.7 MHz

Temperature rating: -40°C ~ 125°C

Board size: approx. 66 x 18 mm / 2.6 x 0.71 inches

IO interface has strong driving capability, sink current and source current up to 25mA

Package list:

1 x IO Expansion Module

2 x pin header

From the brand

What is Fafeicy?

Fafeicy means Faithful, Absorbedly, Famous, Effectual, Imaginative, Convenient, Young.

Previous page

  2. After years of development, FAFECIY has become one of the leading brands of industrial and household products. FAFECIY can supply industrial supplies, household tools, home decoration, hand tools, lighting accessories for countless professionals, commercial professionals, carpenters, electricians and DIY enthusiasts. FAFECIY makes your life more convenient.

  3. Electric, hardware

    Visit the store

  4. How can we do this?

    Fafeicy has become one of the leading brands of industrial and household products, supplying products that are not found in the supermarket.

    What makes our products unique?

    From simple circuit cards to household switches, from hand tools to industrial electronics. You can always find it.

    Why do we love what we do?

    We love to offer our loyal customers the latest and most beautiful products, make our work and sweat worth every product!

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

About this Item

  • [Flexible Configuration] This IO expansion module features an I2C interface that extends 16 IO channels, allows flexible configuration of inputs and outputs, and is compatible with both 5V and 3.3V systems.
  • [Full Features] Equipped with MicroChip's MCP23017 chip, this module offers complete functions where each of the 10 channels can be configured as input or output. In addition, features such as pull-up resistance settings and activation of the interrupt function are available for configured inputs.
  • [High Speed IC Interface] The MCP23017 chip used in this module supports a high-speed IC interface with IIC frequencies of 100 kHz, 400 kHz and 1.7 MHz, ensuring efficient and fast data transmission.
  • [Maximum I/O Expansion] With 3 address pins and 8 available addresses for configuration, this module enables up to 128 I/O expansions by connecting 8 modules via two IC buses. It offers comprehensive scalability for various applications.
  • Compact and versatile: With a size of approx. 66 x 18 mm, this IO expansion module is compact yet powerful, making it suitable for various electronic components and applications where precise IO control is required.

Product description

Specification: Item Type:IO Expansion Module Working voltage: 3 V ~ 5.5 V. Frequency: Support 100KHz, 400KHz, 1.7MHz Temperature rating: -40°C ~ 125°C. Board size: approx. 66 x 18 mm / 2.6 x 0.71 inches. IO interface has strong driving capability, sink current and source current up to 25mA Package list: 1 x IO Expansion Module 2 x pin header.
